title: calea graminifolia
intro: Calea graminifolia, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a perennial plant native to the deserts and grasslands of Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calea graminifolia include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Calea graminifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used as a natural remedy to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
